case_title: ADVANCED COMPUTER REPAIR VS SIERRA TAHOE MFG INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SIERRA TAHOE MFG INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $373.97 FILED BY ADVANCED COMPUTER REPAIR AS TO DEFENDANT SIERRA TAHOE MFG INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADVANCED COMPUTER REPAIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIERRA TAHOE MFG INC. $116.50 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $124.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-27-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-08-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
